brief.one_liner: Duration cheap at 2.06% real yield, but global cycle peaking + tenor firing = sell rallies, not buy dips.
brief.thesis: The 10Y real yield sits at 2.06% (85.1th percentile vs history), suggesting duration is structurally cheap—a signal that normally anchors a bull case. However, this is a DIVERGENCE trap. The Khalid Index scores 24 (CRISIS regime), with tenor signal firing at 48.0, global cycle peaking (CLI 109.3), and leading markets flashing TOP_WARNING (breadth 42.1%). Smart money is DISTRIBUTING (CFTC 31/100 positioning). The 2s10s curve at 0.46% (34.9th pctile, COVID-crash-like flatness) combined with 10Y breakeven at 2.39% (79.5th pctile, GFC-peak-like) suggests the market is pricing neither growth nor inflation relief—a dangerous middle ground. Auctions remain CALM and HY spreads tight at 2.72% (8.8th pctile), masking credit stress. This rhymes with late 2007 (before the GFC unwind): real yields looked cheap, but the cycle was rolling over. Duration is a value trap until the tenor signal clears or leading breadth stabilizes above 50%.

tlt_pred.analog_outcome: Real yields fell to 1.5%, curve flattened, but cycle peaked. TLT rallied 4% in 4 weeks, then fell 12% over next 8 weeks as equities rolled over.
tlt_pred.upside_trigger: 10Y yield breaks 4.10% on risk-off; SPY falls >5%; breadth collapses <35%.
tlt_pred.reasoning: Real yield 2.06% (85th pctile) is cheap, but tenor firing + cycle peaking = duration rally is tactical, not structural. Sell rallies.

sample_trades.setup: Sell TLT rallies into 10Y yield 4.20%; duration too cheap to hold.
sample_trades.level: Short TLT at 92.50 (equiv. 10Y ~4.20%); cover at 94.50 or stop 91.50
sample_trades.thesis_link: Real yield 2.06% is value trap; tenor firing + breadth collapse = duration rally fades.

sample_trades.setup: Buy IEF (belly) on dips to 99.50; carry + roll-down offset duration risk.
sample_trades.level: Long IEF at 99.50 (7-10yr sweet spot); target 101.00 over 8 weeks
sample_trades.thesis_link: Belly curve offers 4.3% yield with lower DV01 than long-end. Barbell vs TLT.

sample_tripwires.action: Cover TLT short; reassess if tenor signal clears or breadth stabilizes >50%.
Exit all credit longs; rotate to duration. Systemic stress signal.
